privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the R built-in InsectSprays dataset containing a 'count' variable across different sprays. The Shapiro-Wilk test for normality on the 'count' variable yields p = 0.7487 for group A and p = 0.1009 for group F. Since both p-values are >= 0.05, the data is assumed to be normally distributed, leading to the use of an Independent Samples T-Test (p = 0.3465) instead of the Mann-Whitney U test.
